generatedStatePolicy: Tracked scenario matrix only; generated export bundles, staging roots, checksums, logs, screenshots, temp servers, dashboard exports, and local tool state remain ignored unless explicitly fixture-scoped.
boundary: Local evidence-backed export regression coverage only; no publish, deploy, sign, upload, mobile/console/store export, desktop wrapper, browser trusted writes, command bridge, production-ready export claim, or Godot replacement claim.

scenarios.expected: local web bundle stages only declared files
asset manifest hashes and rewrite map are deterministic
verification steps are local metadata and allowlisted smokes
evidence refs remain fixture-scoped and read-only
dashboard and Studio inspect exported data without write controls
missing asset root diagnostic blocks promotion
unsafe paths and traversal fail closed before writes
publish, deploy, sign, upload, and CI release targets are rejected
missing probe global or method blocks compatibility claim
generated outputs remain ignored or explicitly fixture-scoped
checksum drift is reported as blocked evidence, not accepted
desktop wrapper is design-gated and mobile/console/store targets are blocked
